title: Laddu Laddu Lyrics Rajapattai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vikram, Andrea Jeremiah, Suchitra, Priyadarshini
Song: Laddu Laddu Rendu Laddu
Music: Yuvan
Movie : Rajapattai

Hey laddu laddu, rendu laddu
laddu laddu, rendu laddu
serndhu kedachale luck-e luck-e

Sukku na sukku malli, sundhari nadakira coffee
suda kothikaiyila soda yenathuku
Eduthu kudikavaa dosth-u dosth-u
idhukku edhuvum ila vaasthu vaasthu

Kuchi naan kuchi mittai, kumari naan panju mittai
besha irukaiyile pizza ennathuku
Indhaa eduthuko taste-u taste-u
innum thayanguna waste-u waste-u

laddu laddu, rendu laddu
serndhu kedachale luck-e luck-e
ottu ottu irikka ottu
vaari anachaale kick-e kick-e

Vadivel kanthanuku rendu peru jodi
avanga appaavukkum ullathudhaan podi
Adiye pombalaikum rendu veedu thaandi
adhula enna kutham vaaya pothi khodi

kaal-kaiyu rendu dhaan theva theva
kattunava rendu na bejaaru
Veedu vaasal rendu na ok ok
pondaattinga rendu yen ne kooru

Aasai meeruna alave illaye,
edhuku podura veli veli
paambu venuma? yeni venuma?
kuluki podava soli soli ... (laddu laddu ...)

Pagale illayana vanthiduma night-u
kavala venamuna vachukanum sight-u
Thavare ilayina onnum illa right-u
jaikka venumuna podanume fight-u

Suriyana pola naan otha aalu
vennilavu rendu na aagadhe
Thaamarai-ku thanni thaan kootu kootu
thanni vachhi paaichina thaangadhe

Edhayum thaanguven, ellam ketuko
pootuk kaakave saavi saavi
koora panjava, elavam panju nee
ilukka paakura koovi koovi

laddu laddu, rendu laddu
serndhu kedachale luck-e luck-e
ottu ottu irikka ottu
vaari anachaale kick-e kick-e

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Laddu Laddu?

The song is a lively and energetic dance number that adds a fun element to the movie.

Who are the singers of Laddu Laddu?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah, Priyadharshini, and Suchitra.

Who composed the music for Rajapattai?

The music for the movie was composed by Yuvan.

What is the release year of Rajapattai?

The movie was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Laddu Laddu from the movie Rajapattai is a high-energy dance number that perfectly captures the vibrant and playful mood of the film. Sung by Andrea Jeremiah, Priyadharshini, and Suchitra, the track is composed by Yuvan and features catchy lyrics by Yugabharathi. It is designed to get listeners on their feet with its infectious rhythm and lively beats. The song conveys a sense of fun and celebration, making it ideal for parties and energetic gatherings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with the electrifying beats of Laddu Laddu from the movie Rajapattai. This energetic track, brought to life by Yuvan's vibrant music and the dynamic vocals of Andrea Jeremiah, Priyadharshini, and Suchitra, is a perfect party anthem. Dive into the peppy vibes and let the rhythm take over!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, if you get two sweets together, it's lucky, lucky.
Ginger and jasmine, a beautiful girl walking, why do you need soda with hot coffee? Drink it, friend, there's no problem with it.
I'm like a candy stick, a girl like cotton candy, why do you need pizza when this is nice? Take this, it's tasty, if you hesitate, it's a waste.
If you get two sweets together, it's lucky, lucky. If you squeeze them together, it's exciting, exciting.
Vadivel Kanthan has two names, even their father has it in his heart. For girls, crossing two houses, what's wrong with that? Keep your mouth shut.
Two hands and legs are needed, if tied up, it's annoying. Two house entrances are okay, two wives, why do I need them?
If desires exceed limits, why put up fences? Do you need snakes? Do you need elephants? Shake and throw them away.
If there's no day, night will come. Don't worry, keep an eye out. If you miss a leaf, it's okay, if you want to win, you must fight.
Like the sun, I'm a single person, two moons won't work. A lotus needs water, if you pour too much, it can't handle it.
I can bear anything, ask everything, lock it up, keep the key. If you talk too much, everything will be cotton, you'll see.
If you get two sweets together, it's lucky, lucky. If you squeeze them together, it's exciting, exciting.
